basic_details.job_title: Barnala District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Worker and Guard Posts
basic_details.short_information: Barnala District Court has released the official Worker and Guard Notification 2026. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the Barnala District Court Worker and Guard Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 40 years with qualifications of Matriculation with knowledge of Punjabi language for Worker and Middle standard with knowledge of Punjabi language for Guard can apply through offline mode before 05-08-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Worker: Minimum age 20 years, Maximum age 40 years. Guard: Minimum age 18 years, Maximum age 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculate with knowledge of Punjabi language for Worker; Middle standard with knowledge of Punjabi language for Guard.
qualification.details: Worker: Matriculate with knowledge of Punjabi language. Guard: Middle standard with knowledge of Punjabi language.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per minimum wages fixed by the Deputy Commissioner, Barnala.
salary_details.details: Worker: As per the minimum wages fixed by the Deputy Commissioner, Barnala, as admissible from time to time. Guard: As per the minimum wages fixed by the Deputy Commissioner, Barnala, as admissible from time to time.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Barnala District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://barnala.dcourts.gov.in/
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Barnala District Court Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Barnala District Court Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Barnala District Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

Barnala District Court Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Barnala District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://barnala.dcourts.gov.in/ Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Barnala District Court Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Barnala District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Barnala District Court Worker and Guard posts is 05 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Worker and Guard posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies, with 1 post for Worker and 1 post for Guard.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Guard post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Guard post is Middle standard with knowledge of the Punjabi language.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Worker post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Worker post is between 20 to 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q6. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to the office of the undersigned as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary for these posts will be as per the minimum wages fixed by the Deputy Commissioner, Barnala.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for Barnala District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Worker and Guard posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a skill test and/or an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply for both posts?
faq.answer: Yes, you can apply for both posts, but a separate application must be submitted for each post.
